'''yajuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readdition|readdition]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readdition|readdition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yajuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjiwith|yæjiwith]] || [[word:yæjiwij|yæjiwij]] || [[word:yæjiwish|yæjiwish]] || [[word:yæjiwi|yæjiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajujuwuth|yajujuwuth]] || [[word:yajujuwuj|yajujuwuj]] || [[word:yajujuwush|yajujuwush]] || [[word:yajujuwu|yajujuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajuwuth|yajuwuth]] || [[word:yajuwuj|yajuwuj]] || [[word:yajuwush|yajuwush]] || [[word:yajuwu|yajuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajufwuth|yajufwuth]] || [[word:yajufwuj|yajufwuj]] || [[word:yajufwush|yajufwush]] || [[word:yajufwuf|yajufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajuwuthu|yajuwuthu]] || [[word:yajuwuju|yajuwuju]] || [[word:yajuwushu|yajuwushu]] || [[word:yajuwuku|yajuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajuwuth|yajuwuth]] || [[word:yajuwuj|yajuwuj]] || [[word:yajuwush|yajuwush]] || [[word:yajuwu|yajuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajuwuthul|yajuwuthul]] || [[word:yajuwujul|yajuwujul]] || [[word:yajuwushul|yajuwushul]] || [[word:yajuwukul|yajuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajuwuthuthu|yajuwuthuthu]] || [[word:yajuwujuju|yajuwujuju]] || [[word:yajuwushushu|yajuwushushu]] || [[word:yajuwuku|yajuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajuwuthun|yajuwuthun]] || [[word:yajuwujun|yajuwujun]] || [[word:yajuwushun|yajuwushun]] || [[word:yajuwukun|yajuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajuwuthuoro|yajuwuthuoro]] || [[word:yajuwujuoro|yajuwujuoro]] || [[word:yajuwushuoro|yajuwushuoro]] || [[word:yajuwukuoro|yajuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
